response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 10+ years of polyglot experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery, RAG architectures, vector databases, Python, and major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz. The customer-facing technical leadership and AI-system evaluation/observability work expected at Staff FDE level is not clearly evidenced.
strengths: 10+ years shipping production software across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions or production RAG/vector DB systems
Python experience not listed in skills; primary languages are TS, DLang, JS
Limited multi-cloud breadth and no demonstrated customer-facing discovery/technical-leadership track record

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work
Missing Python and broad cloud platform experience
